stemHtml: In a sideslip, how is the directional stability affected by sweepback?

options.a: Decreases because it increases the AoA of the upwind wing.
options.b: Increases because it increases the AoA of the upwind wing.
options.c: Increases because it decreases the AoA of the upwind wing.
options.d: Decreases because it decreases the AoA of the upwind wing.
